name: Use of Potentially Dangerous Function
description: The product invokes a potentially dangerous function that could introduce a vulnerability if used incorrectly, even though the function can also be used safely. Examples include strcpy() which may cause buffer overflows when destination buffers are inadequately sized.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM node invokes a known dangerous API function (e.g., strcpy, sprintf, gets) that flows data into STORAGE[buffer] without a CONTROL[bounds_check] or TRANSFORM[safe_alternative] mediating the operation
